speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Learning experiences
questions: When did you start learning English?
Why did you decide to learn it?
How long did you study every week?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I started learning English when I was ten. I decided to learn it because I wanted to travel. I studied for about five hours every week.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Mistakes and explanations
questions: Did you ever miss an important meeting or class?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I missed an important meeting once. I didn't go because I didn't have time. Afterwards, I told my manager and explained the situation.
